Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 62 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Scientists capture how cells trigger inflammation 20 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Herbie: Automatically improve imprecise floating point formulas 184 upvotes, 37 comments
  4. iNaturalist 501 upvotes, 120 comments
  5. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 146 upvotes, 33 comments
  7. What life looks like on the most remote inhabited island 41 upvotes, 7 comments
  8. Simple self-distillation improves code generation 379 upvotes, 115 comments
  9. Artemis II crew take “spectacular” image of Earth 956 upvotes, 325 comments
  10. Some Unusual Trees 183 upvotes, 52 comments
  11. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 106 upvotes, 36 comments
  12. The most-disliked people in the publishing industry 72 upvotes, 24 comments
  13. Why the Most Valuable Things You Know Are Things You Cannot Say 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  14. Components of a Coding Agent 71 upvotes, 24 comments
  15. OpenClaw privilege escalation vulnerability 486 upvotes, 223 comments
  16. Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165 59 upvotes, 20 comments
  17. Iran's Network of Cameras Bolsters Air Defenses, Expert Says 33 upvotes, 9 comments
  18. The Cathedral, the Bazaar, and the Winchester Mystery House 111 upvotes, 44 comments
  19. Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years 253 upvotes, 158 comments
  20. Notes from from Butterick's Practical Typography 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Author of "Careless People" banned from saying anything negative about Meta 396 upvotes, 269 comments
  22. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 947 upvotes, 730 comments
  23. When legal sports betting surges, so do Americans' financial problems 46 upvotes, 24 comments
  24. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 41 upvotes, 23 comments
  25. Electrical Transformer Manufacturing Is Throttling the Electrified Future 19 upvotes, 8 comments
  26. Astronomers Find a Third Galaxy Missing Its Dark Matter 13 upvotes, 5 comments
  27. 12,000 AI-generated blog posts added in a single commit 103 upvotes, 89 comments
  28. Show HN: Running local OpenClaw together with remote agents in an open network 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. US deploying nearly all stealthy long-range JASSM-ER cruise missiles to Iran war 13 upvotes, 7 comments
  30. Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:30am, 5 April 2026. Source here.
